  1. edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.pile

Uses of Package
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.pile

Packages that use edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.pile
Package
Description
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.game
Represent the game driver and game-specific components for Uno
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.pile
Represent Uno playing cards (color, values and actions)
  • Classes in edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.pile used by edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.game
    Class
    Description
    Deck
    Representation of a deck of Uno cards containing 4 colors: Red, Yellow, Green, Blue 10 numeric values: 0..9, inclusive 5 actions: skip, reverse, draw 2, wild, wild draw 4 as follows 1 each: 0 of each color 2 each: 1..9 of each color 2 each: skip, reverse, draw 2 of each color 4 each: wild, wild draw 4 of any color (changeable during game play to any color)
    DiscardPile
    Representation of a discard pile
    Hand
    Representation of a hand of cards
    Pile
    Representation of a pile of Uno playing cards
    Stock
    Representation of a stock of cards
  • Classes in edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.pile used by edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.pile
    Class
    Description
    Deck
    Representation of a deck of Uno cards containing 4 colors: Red, Yellow, Green, Blue 10 numeric values: 0..9, inclusive 5 actions: skip, reverse, draw 2, wild, wild draw 4 as follows 1 each: 0 of each color 2 each: 1..9 of each color 2 each: skip, reverse, draw 2 of each color 4 each: wild, wild draw 4 of any color (changeable during game play to any color)
    Pile
    Representation of a pile of Uno playing cards
